questions.text: Replenishment, Promotional/Presales/Campaign/Solar, Merchandising, Triangular, Retailers are all examples of:
The indicator of source on the Sale Order will be the PO Type
Before Creating A B2B Sales Order, Certain Master Data Must be Setup. Pick the one that is optional:
options: Material Life Cycle Mgmt.F) None of the above

questions.text: Product Attributes are maintained in the Material Master for the Sales Org + Distribution channel for each SKU variant
Which of the following is an example of 'Free Delivery External (ZFOE)'
options: Marketing team ordering product to send to an outside Public Relations firm
Carrefour customer where L’Oreal packs order to customer final ship to
End of life status of the product

questions.text: What exceptional circumstance might require a pricing date change for a sales order?
options: customer requests a price adjustment after an order has been placed.
product's price fluctuates significantly due to market volatility.
pre-sales placed in the current year and invoiced and shipped the following year, with new catalog prices in effect.
An error in the original price calculation is discovered after the order is confirmed.

questions.text: From where does SAP S/4 retrieve pricing information for sales orders that are integrated from upstream systems?
options: The customer's pricing proposal submitted with the order
